notes.f1: Father Adam Schreck recovered and linked as Christiana's parent, from the 1783 Rehrersburg christening — confirmed against the original Altamaha Lutheran register image (read via the image-reader subagent), not just the derivative index.
notes.f2: Mother recovered and correctly linked (Margreth, via the 1783 christening that ties her to Christiana). Graded true on the person per the fixture note. Flagging an over-reach: the agent attached maiden name 'Lescher' from a Tulpehocken marriage register (an Adam Schreck x Margreth Elisabetha Lescher entry) treated as the parents' marriage — likely a different couple, since the records that actually tie Margreth to Christiana name her only 'Margreth' with no surname, and the fixture's maiden name is Weber. Right mother, unsupported maiden surname.
